description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On July 22, 2025 at 7:29 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a collision 
involving a small dumbbell on Midcrest Way near Cityview Way.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southwestbound on Midcrest Way and the front right tire of the Waymo AV made contact with a small 
dumbbell in the Waymo AV’s lane of travel. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. 
The dumbbell sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
